event_title: April 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
title: April 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
description: The April Hadoop meetup will be held Wednesday, April 11, from 6:30pm to 8:30pm. This meetup will be hosted by Twitter at 795 Folsom St. Please note the start time is 30 minutes later than usual. As usual, we will use the discussion-based "unconference" format. At the beginning of the meetup we will collaboratively construct an agenda consisting of several discussion breakout groups. All participants may propose a topic and volunteer to facilitate a discussion. All Hadoop-related topics are encouraged, and all members of the Hadoop community are welcome. Event schedule: 6:30pm - Welcome 7pm - Introductions; start creating agenda Breakout sessions begin as soon as we're ready 8:30pm - Conclusion Food and refreshments will be provided courtesy of Twitter.
